questions.question: Who was never a judge on American Idol? Nicki Minaj, Ellen DeGeneres, or Sharon Osborne?
This company founded in 1995 was created 'to bring together buyers and sellers in an honest and open marketplace.'
Known for high-speed, intricate lyrics, what rapper had hits 'Put Your Hands Where My Eyes Could See,' 'Dangerous,' and 'Gimme Some More'?
Michael Jordan did this for the first time on October 6, 1993, then again on January 13, 1999.
What phrase did Johnny Cochran drill into the jury concerning OJ's bloody glove?
questions.answer: "If it doesn't fit, you must acquit."
